div.head: 229. Editorial Note
div.p:
Delegations from the United States and the United Kingdom, led by President Eisenhower and Prime Minister Macmillan, respectively, met at Bermuda for a 3-day conference, March 21–23, in order to discuss matters of mutual concern. Extensive documentation on these
talks, which includes discussion of European integration, is scheduled for publication in a forthcoming Foreign Relations volume.
